# Stat

A statistics display component for presenting numerical data with labels and trend indicators.

## Import

```jsx
import {
  Stat,
  StatLabel,
  StatValueText,
  StatHelpText,
  StatUpIndicator,
  StatDownIndicator,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Stat` | The root stat container. |
| `StatLabel` | The label describing the statistic. |
| `StatValueText` | The primary numerical value. |
| `StatHelpText` | Supplementary text below the value. |
| `StatUpIndicator` | An upward arrow indicator for positive trends. |
| `StatDownIndicator` | A downward arrow indicator for negative trends. |

## Props

### Stat

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `string` | `"md"` | The size of the stat component. |

## Usage

### Basic Stat

```jsx
<Stat>
  <StatLabel>Total Revenue</StatLabel>
  <StatValueText>$45,670</StatValueText>
</Stat>
```

### Stat with Trend Indicator

```jsx
<Stat>
  <StatLabel>Monthly Users</StatLabel>
  <StatValueText>12,345</StatValueText>
  <StatHelpText>
    <StatUpIndicator /> 23.5% from last month
  </StatHelpText>
</Stat>

<Stat>
  <StatLabel>Bounce Rate</StatLabel>
  <StatValueText>42.1%</StatValueText>
  <StatHelpText>
    <StatDownIndicator /> 5.2% from last month
  </StatHelpText>
</Stat>
```

### Multiple Stats

```jsx
<HStack gap="8">
  <Stat>
    <StatLabel>Impressions</StatLabel>
    <StatValueText>1.2M</StatValueText>
  </Stat>
  <Stat>
    <StatLabel>Clicks</StatLabel>
    <StatValueText>45K</StatValueText>
  </Stat>
  <Stat>
    <StatLabel>CTR</StatLabel>
    <StatValueText>3.75%</StatValueText>
  </Stat>
</HStack>
```
